query:
INSERT INTO projectValidationGates (projectId, primaryAcceptable, backupAcceptable, digestSafe, gateSetBy, gateSetAt, gateNote)
VALUES 
  (690089, 1, 1, 1, 'admin-dan-day-rescue-18may', NOW(), 'Dan Day digest rescue 18 May 2026 — 23 send_ready contacts (Newmont Cadia, NSW)'),
  (360011, 1, 1, 1, 'admin-dan-day-rescue-18may', NOW(), 'Dan Day digest rescue 18 May 2026 — 13 send_ready contacts (QLD Government, Toowoomba)'),
  (660020, 1, 1, 1, 'admin-dan-day-rescue-18may', NOW(), 'Dan Day digest rescue 18 May 2026 — 7 send_ready contacts (TasWater, TAS)')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  primaryAcceptable = VALUES(primaryAcceptable),
  backupAcceptable = VALUES(backupAcceptable),
  digestSafe = VALUES(digestSafe),
  gateSetBy = VALUES(gateSetBy),
  gateSetAt = VALUES(gateSetAt),
  gateNote = VALUES(gateNote);
